
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] I first identified and picked the object tagged as 4. Then I looked around to locate the indoor plant where I should place this object. I placed the object tagged as 4 near the indoor plant on the shelf at position \(x=1.78, y=0.08, z=1.2\). Next, I picked the glass tagged as 37 and placed it next to the plate at position \(x=0.32, y=0.58, z=0.45\) on the table. Both requested tasks have been completed successfully.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762969026618, 'end': 1762969037214, 'elapsed': 10596}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=9162, completion=122, total=9284
</details>

</details>
